name: Amazon
interviewFormat: 5-7 rounds: 1 phone screen, multiple bar-raiser loops (each has coding + 2-3 LP behavioral questions), 1 system design
questionPatterns: tell me about a time you disagreed with your manager
describe a situation where you had to make a decision with incomplete data
design a highly available order processing system
tell me about a time you delivered results under extreme pressure
describe your most challenging technical project and the trade-offs you made
redFlags: recent examples only (interviewers notice recency bias)
